playbook.intent: Founder runs a 10-minute async standup with 1-3 contractors. Output: blockers surfaced, day's deliverables confirmed, founder unblocked from being the bottleneck.
playbook.scope: Founder runs a 10-minute async standup with 1-3 contractors. Output: blockers surfaced, day's deliverables confirmed, founder unblocked from being the bottleneck.

success-criteria.criterion: All 3 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Set Async Norms

tasks.task: Pick the channel, the time window, and the template
Decide what counts as a blocker that needs synchronous escalation

stage.decision-gate: Advance when every active contractor has acknowledged the norms.

stage.name: Run the Loop Daily
stage.intent: Hit the template every working day.

tasks.task: Each contractor posts: yesterday, today, blockers — in template
Founder reads within the 2-hour window and unblocks where needed
Anything that exceeds the async window gets a same-day call

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when the loop has run 5 consecutive working days.

stage.name: Weekly Review
stage.intent: Use the week's posts as the operating signal.

tasks.task: Aggregate the week's blockers and recurring overruns
Spot pattern blockers and fix them at the root
Adjust contractor scope where signal repeats

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a weekly written adjustment from the standup signal.
